article_title: Bylaw 14758 — Housing Agreement (7786 and 7792 6th St) Bylaw 2025

briefs.title: Burnaby locks in 174 non-market rental units at 6th Street under permanent housing agreement
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council passed Bylaw 14758 on August 26, 2025, authorizing a formal housing agreement with Metro Vancouver Housing Corporation for a 174-unit affordable rental building at 7786 and 7792 6th Street. The agreement is registered on the property title (a legal note attached to the land record that binds all future owners), permanently restricting the units to low- and moderate-income renters.
briefs.industries: Construction & Development, Landlord & Property Mgmt, Tenant
